body_html:
Emanuella,

The phone number we have for you isn't connecting — likely a typo somewhere, easy fix. Whenever you have a minute, can you reply with the best number to reach you?

I also want to make sure I'm tracking the right conversation here. You came in through our Instagram → website path, which usually means someone's either planning their own event or thinking about something professional. Either is welcome — just let me know which one you're working on, and I'll tailor what I send next so we're not wasting your time.

If it's a personal wedding for 101-200 guests in the Bedford area, full-service, I want to be useful on it. If it's something else — partnership conversation, industry inquiry, anything — I'm equally happy to talk in that lane.

Send me the right number and a sentence about what you're after, and I'll take it from there.

Andre
Comeketo Catering
